1.0.2: Hand tool and reworked left toolbar with Add drawer
Group name labels above grouped items
What's New highlights on the landing page after updates
Align and normalize tools with updated selection bar icons
1.0.3: Your board now restores automatically when you reopen the app — no more lost sessions.
Much faster zoom and panning on boards with lots of images.
Significantly lower memory usage on large boards.
Fixed images from one board occasionally appearing in another.
Fixed opening a corrupted board wiping the board you already had open.
1.0.4: Fixed copied and exported images coming out blurry.
1.0.5: Notes now show links as clickable text instead of raw markdown while editing.
Click anywhere in a note to place your cursor there.
Checkboxes render properly, and pasting from ChatGPT or the web keeps your bullets.
Fixed text alignment, spacing, and sizing issues in notes.
1.0.6: New app icon and a refreshed look.
RefBoard files now show a preview thumbnail in File Explorer.
1.1.0: New app icon and a refreshed look.
RefBoard files now show a preview thumbnail in File Explorer.
Notes: click to place your cursor, cleaner lists and checkboxes, and links show as clickable text.
Copy and paste now keeps your groups and pastes images individually.
Uses less memory with large image boards.
Fixed the save prompt after exporting, wheel scrolling on the home screen, and several zoom-related glitches.
